assess_scope: - The skill covers LINE Login v2.1: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow, PKCE, ID token verification, token management, user profile, and security.
- Do NOT trigger for: Messaging API webhooks/bots, LIFF (liff.init/sendMessages), LINE MINI App, LINE Notification Messages.
